response.original_title: The Dalek Chronicles: The Pentaray Factor
response.overview: In the sixth story, the Daleks land on the planet Solturis declaring peace and friendship. It's an unlikely claim, but the locals have no reason to disbelieve - apart from old Lurr, who has seen a vision of the future showing destruction and slavery beneath the Daleks. But who will listen to his claims?
response.title: The Dalek Chronicles: The Pentaray Factor
